title: Thread Lifecycle Inference
scope: Parse bounded tail markers from Codex session JSONL.
Normalize lifecycle state and reason on thread summaries.
Render lifecycle state in Thread Explorer without loading full histories.
non_goals: Do not infer completion from idle time alone.
Do not introduce Python or FastAPI runtime paths.
Do not redesign the full Board card UI in this phase.

tasks.title: Add bounded session tail event reader
tasks.details: Read only a byte-limited and line-limited tail window from rollout JSONL for list rendering.

tasks.title: Add pure lifecycle inference helper
tasks.details: Infer running, queued, waiting, completed, needs_attention, aborted, or unknown from recent markers.

tasks.title: Attach lifecycle to normalized thread summary
tasks.details: Expose lifecycle.state, lifecycle.reason, recent_markers, recent_tools, previews, and last_event_at.

tasks.title: Render lifecycle in Thread Explorer
tasks.details: Show one state badge and one reason line without crowding quick actions.

tasks.title: Add lifecycle regression tests
tasks.details: Cover task_complete, open turn, tool call, tool output, aborted turn, final answer, and commentary stop.

acceptance: Thread list does not require full history loads.
At least five lifecycle states are covered by tests.
Lifecycle reasons are visible and evidence-grounded.
completion_notes: Added bounded lifecycle inference from sampled Codex JSONL events.
Attached lifecycle to normalized thread summaries and thread details.
Rendered lifecycle state, reason, and recent tool chips in Thread Explorer.
Added direct lifecycle inference tests plus discovered rollout fixture assertions.
